full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #91 (2026-07-13)

PULSE
Health: 0.5846 (C). 1060 wallets, 319 contributors. 17 memos today vs 31 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
43 reward payments, 207888 PFT distributed to 19 contributors. Top earner: rUjqjr...PFdn (114002 PFT).

AIRDROPS
Daily airdrops not yet issued today (drops at ~21:08 UTC).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rKF7zT...bQSf (1 memos). 2 new wallet(s) this week. 119 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 69.2%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: partial. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-06-13): 171 transactions from 20 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
